summary: Iteration 47 testing complete. Film Wizard restructure features verified: 12-step wizard with sticky header and step indicator, 80+ locations with category filters (studios/cities/nature/historical), dynamic sponsor system (0-4 sponsors based on pre_rating), Back button disabled at step>=11 (verified in code). All 20 backend API tests passed. UI testing confirmed: login works, wizard navigation, location category filters, mobile bottom navbar with 6 icons.

integration_issues.issue: Multiple 429 errors when loading cast members rapidly - likely due to frequent API calls when navigating quickly
integration_issues.note: This is external rate limiting, not a code bug

critical_code_review_comments: FilmWizard.jsx line 1274: Sticky header correctly positioned with sticky top-14 z-20 ✓
FilmWizard.jsx line 1275: Step indicator shows 12 circles with correct styling (yellow=current, green=completed, gray=pending) ✓
FilmWizard.jsx line 1279: Back button disabled at step>=11 (step===1||step>=11) ✓
FilmWizard.jsx lines 129-162: calculatePreRating() function correctly uses screenwriters, directors, composers arrays (bug fix verified) ✓
FilmWizard.jsx line 398: loadDynamicSponsors() called at step 11 ✓
FilmWizard.jsx lines 990-995: Location category filter buttons (Tutte, Studi & Set, Metropoli, Natura, Storici) ✓
server.py line 1950-1987: /api/sponsors/dynamic endpoint correctly returns 0-4 sponsors based on pre_rating ✓
server.py line 903-991: LOCATIONS array has 88 locations with category field (studios/cities/nature/historical) ✓
App.js line 562: Mobile bottom navbar with 6 icons (Home, Film, Social, Sfide, Chat, Notifiche) ✓
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified Film Wizard restructure. Key findings: 1) Sticky header with 12-step indicator at top-14 z-20 works on both desktop and mobile. 2) 88 locations with 5 category filters (Tutte=all, Studi & Set=studios, Metropoli=cities, Natura=nature, Storici=historical). 3) Dynamic sponsor endpoint /api/sponsors/dynamic accepts pre_rating (0-100) and returns 0 sponsors (<30), 1 (30-49), 2 (50-69), 3 (70-84), 4 (85+). 4) Back button disabled at step>=11 confirmed in code. 5) Mobile navbar has 6 icons visible. 6) calculatePreRating bug fix verified - uses screenwriters/directors/composers arrays not undefined 'people'. Rate limiting (429) observed during rapid navigation but not a code issue.

GET /api/genres - 200 OK, returns 16 genres with subgenres
